label: Transparent Fiddlehead Fern motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Fiddlehead transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a single young fiddlehead fern curl with a few tiny unfurling fronds, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: spiral fiddlehead curl, fern green stem, tightly coiled spring forest fronds, fine brown protective fuzz along the curl and stem, small moss-green highlights, subtle natural asymmetry, botanical detail, opaque subject with crisp silhouette.
Style/medium: high-detail botanical cutout, realistic painted-photographic finish, crisp edges, natural soft studio light.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; vertical organic S-curve; no cropping; no floor plane.
Lighting/mood: spring forest onboarding-system mood, fresh, tactile, calm; no cast shadow and no contact shadow.
Color palette: fern green, moss, brown fuzz, shadowed bark-brown, pale new-growth highlights only; do not use magenta anywhere in the subject.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: keep subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges; no text, no watermark, no background plants, no soil patch, no decorative scene, no extra saturated colors.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: the visible transparent Fiddlehead Fern motif is the source reference for colors, texture, shape language, and system identity.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-like design-system board titled "Morphous Fiddlehead".
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, wide 16:9 board, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: organic onboarding system for account setup, guided activation, progress tracking, team invitations, and spring forest learning flows; calm, tactile, fresh, operational, with 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the reference motif: fern green stem, moss green highlights, pale new-growth lime, brown protective fuzz, deep bark-brown shadow, damp forest floor brown, soft spore cream, misty off-white spring forest surfaces. Do not introduce unrelated blue, purple, orange, or generic SaaS gradient colors.
Layout: polished product design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right onboarding dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small fiddlehead motif cutout preview.
Typography: clear English UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "フィドルヘッド", "開始手順", "進捗", "招待".
Components: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, onboarding stepper, progress cards, activation checklist, team invitation form, setup table, growth chart, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle spiral fern curl texture, fine brown fuzz as hairline dividers, moss speckles, bark-edge borders, soft spore-cream panels, compact 8px card rhythm.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn-style product design board; no marketing hero, no abstract gradients, no unrelated colors, no blue/purple SaaS defaults, no watermark.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution dark-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: the visible Fiddlehead Fern motif and the visible Morphous Fiddlehead light design-system board are source references.
Primary request: Generate a separate dark-mode translation titled "Morphous Fiddlehead" with the same organic onboarding-system coverage and layout logic as the light board.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, wide 16:9 board, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: dark palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: organic onboarding system for account setup, guided activation, progress tracking, team invitations, and spring forest learning flows; night forest interface, calm, tactile, fresh, operational, with 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the reference motif: deep bark-brown and forest-floor backgrounds, dark moss panels, fresh fern green primary controls, pale new-growth lime chart accents, brown fuzz dividers, spore-cream text highlights, warm forest-neutral borders. Do not introduce unrelated blue, purple, orange, neon, or generic SaaS gradient colors.
Layout: polished dark product design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right onboarding dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small fiddlehead motif cutout preview.
Typography: clear English UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "フィドルヘッド", "開始手順", "進捗", "招待".
Components: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, onboarding stepper, progress cards, activation checklist, team invitation form, setup table, growth chart, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle spiral fern curl texture, dark fine brown fuzz as hairline dividers, moss speckles, bark-edge borders, low-contrast spore-cream panels, compact 8px card rhythm.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn-style product design board; no marketing hero, no unrelated colors, no pure black flat background, no blue/purple gradients, no watermark.
